text:
(26) If monitoring agency is not required to be appointed as per these
Regulations, the statement that deployment of the issue proceeds is entirely at the
discretion of the issuer.
sentence_window:
Issuer shall also separately
highlight any criminal, regulatory or taxation matters which may have any material
adverse effect on the issuer. (25) The delay, if any, in the schedule of the implementation of the project for
which the funds are being raised in the public issue. (26) If monitoring agency is not required to be appointed as per these
Regulations, the statement that deployment of the issue proceeds is entirely at the
discretion of the issuer. (27) Negative cash flow from operating activities in the last three financial
years. (28) If the land proposed to be acquired from proceeds of the issue is not
registered in the name of the issuer.
